scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && find . -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -name '*.html' -o -name '*.txt' -o -name '*.xml' -o -name '*.json' -o -name '*.ico' \) -exec cp {} dist/ \; && for d in public live-seafood-singapore live-crabs-singapore roe-crab-singapore live-lobster-singapore alaskan-king-crab-singapore oysters-shellfish-singapore soon-hock-singapore fai-kee-collaboration reviews-media; do [ -d "$d" ] && cp -R "$d" dist/ || true; done
